title.raw: Podcast Guest, AI Commentator, Event Host
title.rendered: Podcast Guest, AI Commentator, Event Host

content.raw:
Media + podcasts

AI commentator, podcast guest, and event host.

Bring me in when your audience needs AI to sound human, useful, and alive. I can speak as a creative technologist, photographer, community builder, AI educator, and host who has spent years inside the rooms where technology becomes culture.

What I bring to the mic

Clear AI language

I can explain fast-moving tools without flattening the ethical, creative, and political questions that make them matter.

Field stories

BC + AI, Vancouver AI, creative AI classrooms, keynotes, media rooms, and two decades documenting technology culture.

Good friction

I am comfortable with the messy questions: authorship, labor, trust, consent, community, taste, and power.

Host energy

Warm, curious, fast on the uptake, and happy to help the room find the real question underneath the question.

Producer assets

Short bio

Kris Krug is a creative technologist, photographer, AI community builder, speaker, and founder/operator inside the BC + AI ecosystem.

Topics

Responsible AI, creative practice, community infrastructure, AI literacy, taste, trust, and the weird human edge of technology.

Book Kris for media

Send the topic, format, timing, audience, recording logistics, and any links I should review before we talk.

Start a media inquiry
